signals.npcLine: Markets bleed; whispers of a shadow crash echo through neon alleys.
signals.questPulse: Trace the source of the market's dark pulse before it consumes more.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptos tumble as fear poisons the grid; trust erodes fast.
signals.clueEvent: Data blackout hits trading hubs; suspicious algorithms go silent.

signals.npcLine: RAVE signals drop to zero—intel warns of a ghost virus in the chain.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate the node holding RAVE’s core to extract corrupted data.
signals.worldFeed: Networks detect zero activity on RAVE; anomaly spikes suspicion.
signals.clueEvent: Faulty transactions cascade; silent alarms trip in dark net arcs.

signals.npcLine: AAVE's shadow stirs—low but growing, a quiet upsurge in whispers.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt AAVE code fragments found in rogue data caches.
signals.worldFeed: Subtle shifts signal a potential comeback or new exploit in AAVE.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden packets circulate in low-visibility loops; trace the source.

signals.npcLine: PENGU nodes hum beneath icy veils; a challenge hides in frostbite.
signals.questPulse: Explore PENGU outposts for relics and encrypted boot sectors.
signals.worldFeed: Unstable sigils surface in distant PENGU sectors amid rising dread.
signals.clueEvent: Cold signals pulse on frozen circuits, hinting at hidden caches.

signals.npcLine: SIREN's call distorts; shadow factions race to claim its fading echo.
signals.questPulse: Negotiate with rogue agents vying to control SIREN's last broadcast.
signals.worldFeed: Signal decay breeds conflict—SIREN's influence wanes amid chaos.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented broadcasts leak secrets; betrayals ripple through comms.
